title: Add STEP_DONE signal to engine signals
description:
Add SignalStepDone to the signal constants and pattern maps in internal/engine/signals.go. Add it to signalPatterns, signalPriority (low priority — after CHECKPOINT), and the String() method.

This signal is used by the wrapup harness to detect when an agent has completed a wrapup step.

Files: internal/engine/signals.go, internal/engine/signals_test.go

Test: verify ParseSignals detects <promise>STEP_DONE</promise> and <promise>STEP_DONE: summary</promise>
closed_reason: Added SignalStepDone constant after SignalCheckpoint in signals.go. Added to signalPatterns map, signalPriority slice (lowest priority, after CHECKPOINT), and String() method. Added tests for parsing with/without context and priority ordering.
